programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: During renovations, Andrew's Philadelphia home was taken over by squatters who moved in, changed the locks, and installed security cameras; what begins as a straightforward case quickly escalates into a tense standoff with authorities, as Flash and his team attempt to reclaim the property without any help from the neighborhood.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, health issues forced Zachary out of his dream home; he rented it to seemingly trustworthy tenants-only to realize they were alleged serial squatters who stopped paying and refused to leave; in one of his toughest fights yet, can Flash and his team take this home back?

programme.title: Evict My Kid

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: Burglars target a settlement in Puglia. It's the moment of truth for a French village. And work begins to restore an abandoned Portuguese village.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Mark Chapman in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Joanne and former bodybuilding champion Darren hope to find the perfect holiday home on Spain's eastern Costa del Sol. Can Jean Johansson find a strong enough contender for their £180k.

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: Peter and Noni swap beloved 'Barbarella' for a hire boat and head to the Falkirk Wheel. Tom embarks on his maiden voyage on the Shropshire Union Canal.

programme.title: Chateau DIY: Australia
programme.desc: Here comes the bride! But first, Peter and Linda need to build her some riverside steps. And Janet and Philip reach dizzying heights in their stairwell.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, the Rodriguez sisters look for a slick, modern home for Kris and Ali. In Murcia, the Browns help Terry and his wife Maria to relocate.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We catch up with Steph and Tana in Edinburgh; did they get the family home they were after? And in Derbyshire, did Wendy and Simon find the picture-perfect place they craved.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Pep and Malene are building a modern Viking Hall in the Surrey Hills. Following Pep's cancer diagnosis, it's a race to create a house that cherishes their memories and life together.

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: A £20m former home to royalty is up for sale on Hampstead's Billionaires' Row. There's a hunt for an X-factor home. And what impression will a £3.5m upside-down property make.

programme.title: Building Monaco's Superhomes
programme.desc: Luxury property developer Guy Phoenix embarks on his riskiest build yet: transforming a £16m apartment in Monaco into an opulent superhome. But things go wrong from the get-go..

programme.title: Building Monaco's Superhomes
programme.desc: As Guy Phoenix navigates the intricacies of transforming a £16m apartment in Monaco into an opulent superhome, the pressure's on to complete it in time for the upcoming Grand Prix.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon tries to save the struggling Spin a Yarn restaurant in California. Despite an expensive refurbishment, the business is tearing apart its owners' marriage.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in Trieste
programme.desc: Alan Davies and Joe Lycett traverse around Trieste, shoot the breeze at the Wind Museum, go food and fizz pairing in Prosecco, have a painting lesson and even pop into Slovenia.

programme.title: Move It Milkshakers!
programme.desc: Kemi and Derek introduce the letter G, exploring all sorts of amazing things that begin with G, helping little ones discover letters, sounds before going for a Gallop.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Peppa's bike gets a flat tyre that needs mending, Peppa and her friends have fun riding their imaginary bikes and jumping in pretend muddy puddles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa shows Kylie Kangaroo how to jump up and down in muddy puddles, but who can jump the highest.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: When a run-away duckling follows Grace home from the Ley it's a race against time for Stan and Gran to return it to its family and 'crack' the case.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger puts his mother, Helga Humdinger, up in one of his 'luxury' waterfront homes, he discovers a pair of alligators already live there.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Who is Paddington's special visitor who Jonathan and Judy have helped come from afar.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Frizzy and Spyke believe there's a monster toad at the lake and investigate.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
